Interior Plaster in Caldwell County, TX

Star Stucco of Austin provides interior plaster services to homeowners across Caldwell County. From Lockhart's historic downtown to the newer neighborhoods expanding south of Austin's metro area, we deliver wall finishes that add quality, texture, and lasting beauty to your home.

Get a Free EstimateCall (512) 706-9699

Quality Interior Plaster for Caldwell County Homes

Caldwell County sits just southeast of Austin, close enough to benefit from the capital city's growth while retaining the small-town character that makes Lockhart and Luling distinctive. The housing stock here ranges from turn-of-the-century homes near Lockhart's famous courthouse square to new subdivisions attracting families priced out of Travis County. Interior plaster serves both ends of that spectrum.

Lockhart's historic homes — many built in the late 1800s and early 1900s — often have original plaster walls that need professional attention. Cracks, soft spots, and areas of separation are common after more than a century of settlement. We restore these surfaces using methods compatible with the original construction, preserving the home's period character.

For newer homes in Caldwell County, interior plaster offers an immediate upgrade over standard drywall and builder texture. A smooth skim coat or a decorative plaster accent wall can set a home apart in a neighborhood of similar floor plans, adding perceived value and personal style.

What's Included With Our Interior Plaster in Caldwell County

Every project includes expert craftsmanship, quality materials, and a commitment to lasting results.

Design Consultation

We visit your Caldwell County home to evaluate walls, review your goals, and present finish options. You receive a clear project scope and written estimate before any work starts.

Surface Preparation

Walls are repaired, cleaned, and primed. We protect floors, trim, and furnishings so your home stays clean and orderly throughout the plaster application process.

Base Coat Application

A compatible base coat is applied uniformly across each surface. The product is selected to match your wall substrate and the decorative finish that will be built on top.

Decorative Finish Application

Finish plaster is troweled on by hand in controlled passes. Each layer is worked to develop the texture, depth, and sheen specified during your design consultation.

Color Matching & Tinting

Pigments are mixed directly into the plaster for color that is part of the material, not painted on. We match your existing palette or create new custom tones.

Protective Sealing & Cleanup

A sealer is applied to the cured plaster to protect against everyday wear and moisture. All protective coverings are removed and the area is cleaned up completely.

Common Interior Plaster Needs in Caldwell County

Caldwell County homeowners come to us for interior plaster projects that range from historic restoration to modern upgrades. Here are the most common requests we receive.

Smooth Wall Finishes

Many Caldwell County homes have the standard spray textures that were popular in Texas residential construction for decades. A smooth skim coat brings those walls into a more contemporary, polished state.

Decorative Plaster Accents

A decorative plaster treatment on a fireplace wall, dining room feature, or foyer creates a visual anchor that adds character to Caldwell County homes without a large-scale renovation.

Venetian Plaster

Homeowners in Lockhart's established neighborhoods and the newer custom homes south of town appreciate the refined, stone-like quality of Venetian plaster in their most important living spaces.

Interior Wall Restoration

The historic homes around Lockhart's courthouse square and along the older residential streets sometimes need plaster walls stabilized, patched, or completely resurfaced to halt deterioration.

Custom Textures for Feature Walls

Whether you want a subtle linen-like surface in a bedroom or a bold textured accent in an entertainment space, we create custom finishes that serve as focal points.

Skim Coating Over Textured Walls

Skim coating is a straightforward way for Caldwell County homeowners to modernize dated wall textures. The result is a flat, smooth surface ready for paint or decorative treatment.

Why Choose Us for Interior Plaster in Caldwell County?

  • Skilled artisan plasterers with experience in both historic restoration and modern decorative work
  • Wide range of available finishes, from basic smooth coats to elaborate multi-layer decorative plaster
  • Precise color matching for consistent results that blend with your home's existing design
  • Clean, considerate work practices that keep your Caldwell County home orderly and protected
  • Detailed finish work on corners, edges, and transitions that separates professional results from DIY
  • Custom project plans developed around the specific character and condition of your home

Licensed & Insured

Full liability coverage and workers' compensation for every project in Caldwell County.

20+ Years Experience

Decades of hands-on stucco work across Central Texas residential and commercial properties.

Certified Applicators

Certified by Sto Corp, Senergy/BASF, Master Wall, Dryvit, and Parex LaHabra for the highest quality results.

Our Interior Plaster Process

A straightforward approach from start to finish — no surprises, no shortcuts.

1

Design Consultation

We visit your Caldwell County home to examine the walls, understand your preferences, and present physical samples of the finishes available for your project.

2

Surface Preparation & Priming

Walls are repaired, sanded if needed, and primed. For historic Lockhart homes, we assess the condition of existing plaster and plan restoration steps accordingly.

3

Plaster Application & Finishing

Plaster is applied in controlled layers, each one contributing to the overall texture and color. Our crew maintains consistent coverage and finish quality across the project.

4

Final Review & Touch-Ups

We review the work with you room by room. Any areas requiring refinement are addressed, sealer is applied, and the project is formally completed.
